_comment_1: Claude Desktop MCP config for the ECP demo. Merge the mcpServers block into your existing config at:
_comment_3: After saving, fully quit and relaunch Claude Desktop (Cmd+Q, not just close the window).
_comment_4: Replace ABSOLUTE_PATH_TO_REPO with the real path, e.g. /Users/you/projects/enterprise-context-platform.
_comment_5: Identity is set at runtime via the set_persona tool — no user/department/role env vars needed.
_comment_6: Set ECP_API_KEY only if the ECP server requires it. Leave empty for local dev.
